item.title: Linear algebra basics
item.description: 1. Vector Linear combination of vectors A linear combination is the union of two basic vector operation : addition of vectors and multiplication of a vector by a scalar. Addition of vectors \[v = \begin{bmatrix} v_1 \\ v_2 \end{bmatrix} \qquad \qquad w = \begin{bmatrix} w_1 \\ w_2 \end{bmatrix} \qquad\qquad v + w = \begin{bmatrix} v_1 + w_1 \\ v_2 + w_2 \end{bmatrix}\] v <- c(1,5) w <- c(2,2) u <- v+w x_max = ceiling((v[1]+w[1])*1.

item.title: Robotic Hand Gripper
item.description: repo Printing of the robotic hand $$v = \begin{bmatrix} v_1 v_2 \end{bmatrix} \qquad \qquad w = \begin{bmatrix} w_1 w_2 \end{bmatrix} \qquad\qquad v + w = \begin{bmatrix} v_1 + w_1 v_2 + w_2 \end{bmatrix}$$ The print of the robotic hand was very simple. I just retrieved a template from the site thingiverse. We can find the print files here. Control of the robotic hand The arm integrates 6 servo motor and a step motor.

item.title: A Football Stats Scraper
item.description: repo Motivations I have often wanted to have a statistics dataset of football matches to be able to apply my statistics courses in a domain that I appreciate and not on the datasets provided by software like R or Python (mpg, iris, .. .). The first solution I considered was to look for a database or an opensource API containing this type of data. I found several but none satisfied me (size insufficient, not free, …).

item.title: About
item.description: Hi there I’m Amaury Lekens and this website presents my personal projects in data science, machine learning, robotics, …. This website is powered by Hugo and use the theme terminal by panr. Site is hosted on github.io

item.title: Projects
item.description: Projects This page lists all the projects I’m working on football stats scraper Python program that can retrieve statistics from the flashscore site Repo robotic gripper A robotic hand printed and controlled with arduino
